hero.title: Morpho Cottage

description: Our most popular cottage—queen bed with orthopedic mattress, SKY TV, in-room WiFi, en-suite jacuzzi and shower, and a terrace with volcano and coffee plantation views.

features.text: Hand-made queen bed with orthopedic mattress

booking.title: Reserve Morpho Cottage
booking.description: Reconnect with the rhythm of nature. Our team is ready to help you plan your stay.
